topics.summary: With nine days until the June 3 local elections, both parties are in full campaign mode: the DPK is running on 'insurrection accountability and national normalization' while the PPP counters with 'checking Lee government overreach,' relying on incumbent regional governors to offset a structurally unfavorable environment. Polls show DPK's Jung Won-oh leading PPP's Oh Se-hoon in Seoul 43-46% vs 35-38%.

evidence_headlines.title: 여야 지도부 첫 주말 유세 총력전… 정청래 '호남'·장동혁 '인천'[6.3 지방선거 D-9]
[MBC여론조사] 정원오 43% vs 오세훈 35%…교육감 지지 후보 미정 75%

topics.summary: Starbucks Korea's scheduling of a 'Tank Day' product launch on May 18—the Gwangju Uprising anniversary—sparked a national controversy, compounded by PPP-affiliated figures making dismissive or derogatory comments about the 5.18 movement. DPK leader Jeong Cheong-rae issued a formal Starbucks boycott directive for party campaigners, and the episode has cost the PPP measurable support in Honam.

evidence_headlines.title: [단독] 스타벅스 '탱크데이' 논란 속…국힘 대선캠프 청년혁신위원장 출신 "5·18은 폭동"

topics.summary: Multiple overlapping Yoon Seok-yeol criminal cases remain in active legal proceedings: the arrest-obstruction appeal yielded a 7-year sentence that Yoon has appealed to the Supreme Court, the main insurrection case is under special prosecution appeal, and a separate perjury charge is set for first-instance sentencing on May 28. Coverage keeps the December 3 insurrection front and center heading into the local elections.

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating Slips to 59%
topics.summary: RealMeter's May 25 weekly poll shows President Lee Jae-myung's approval sliding back to 59.3% after briefly touching the low 60s, attributed to controversy over the Samsung wage deal terms and consolidation of the conservative base as formal election campaigning began. The DPK-PPP party gap (47.5% vs 33.3%) remains outside the margin of error for a 16th consecutive week.

topics.topic_en: Kim Kun-hee Conviction and Special Prosecution
topics.topic_ko: 김건희 항소심 유죄 및 특검 구형
topics.summary: The Seoul High Court's late-April guilty verdict against former first lady Kim Kun-hee—four years imprisonment for stock manipulation and bribery—remains a dominant storyline; on May 15, the special prosecutor formally sought a 7-year-6-month sentence in subsequent proceedings. A separate tragic development saw the presiding judge found dead on May 7, though police found no connection to the case.

evidence_headlines.title: '김건희 유죄' 항소심 판사 숨진 채 발견

topics.summary: The multi-party constitutional amendment bill—backed by the DPK and five other parties but opposed by the PPP—failed to reach a vote in the National Assembly on May 7 and will expire with the 22nd Assembly's term. The PPP's boycott blocked a planned concurrent referendum on June 3, a key DPK priority, and has become a campaign flashpoint about the opposition's obstructionist posture.

evidence_headlines.title: 개헌안 표결 '디데이'…'국힘 반대 당론'에 처리 불투명

topics.topic_en: Samsung Electronics Strike Averted by Government
topics.topic_ko: 삼성전자 총파업 극적 타결 및 후속 논란
topics.summary: Samsung Electronics management and the union reached a last-minute wage settlement on May 20, just 90 minutes before a nationwide strike that could have caused up to 100 trillion won in losses; Labor Minister Kim Young-hoon's direct mediation was credited. However, the ratification vote by union members remains pending amid controversy over the deal's performance-bonus terms, keeping the story alive.

evidence_headlines.title: 파업 직전 극적 합의안 도출…삼성전자 노사 한발씩 양보
삼성전자 노사, 총파업 1시간30분 전 극적 타결…파업 전면 유보

topics.topic_en: US Tariffs and Korea Trade Negotiation Strain
topics.topic_ko: 미국 관세 재인상 및 한미 무역협상 압박
topics.summary: Trump's re-escalation of tariffs on South Korea has pushed Korea's effective tariff rate sharply higher, straining the Lee government's 'pragmatic diplomacy' posture and drawing criticism that balancing US and China relationships is proving difficult. The administration is under pressure to conclude trade talks while managing domestic economic concerns over rising prices and export competitiveness.

evidence_headlines.title: 트럼프 관세 재인상 선언: 이재명 '실용 외교'의 한계를 드러낸 트럼프의 견제구

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
